rulings.Case Title: LONNETTE ROBINSON ET AL VS. LARUE PERKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Discharge Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 31, 2020, Line 1. PETITIONER LONNETTE ROBINSON, LAURITA HERBERT, YVONNE THOMPSON, KERRY BOWSER Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Discharge Receiver Hearing Required to Address Receiver's Objections, determine the timeline for termination of receivership and to issue final instructions. =(501/CFH)
